name: Number 58: Burner Visor
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｎｏ．</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ナンバーズ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>５８ <ruby lang="jp"><rb>炎</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>えん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>圧</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>あっ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>鬼</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>バーナー・バイサー
name_jp_tl: Numbers 58: Flame Pressure Demon - Burner Visor
desc:
2 Level 4 monsters
Once per turn, you can either: Target 1 face-up Xyz Monster you control; equip this card to that target, OR: Unequip this card and Special Summon it in Attack Position. The equipped monster can attack your opponent directly. When the equipped monster inflicts battle damage to your opponent: You can discard 1 card; inflict 500 damage to your opponent.

jp_sets.set: Weekly Shōnen Jump 2014, Issue 3 promotional card

action: Activates if battle damage is inflicted
mst: Does not have effects which detach Xyz Materials for cost
summoning: Does not require specific Xyz Materials
Special Summons itself from your Spell & Trap Zone
